title: TEMPLATE Miniature retro bookcase in 1:12 scale | PDF
description: To make this miniature bookcase, you will need: a 1,5 mm thick wooden sheet for all main parts, glue (such as Tacky Glue), sandpaper or a nail file, and optional acrylic paints or varnish for finishing. Additional materials may be used depending on your preferred design and detailing. The price includes 1 PDF file (A4) containing a detailed assembly guide, cutting templates for all parts, and a floral print for the back panel. All parts are clearly labeled according to the s…
